title: "Report: Dependencies of mixed4e_1x1_pre_relu_conv:55[60]"
unlisted: true

</div>
</div>


::: {.text-body-secondary .small .mb-3}
- frequently firing dependency neurons: **116**
- one-off/outlier dependency neurons (fired in fewer than **12** of **119** collected input images, not shown below): **135**
:::

![output activation, distance from noise_med (noise-radius units) — all](assets/output_activation_histogram_all.jpeg)

:::


::: {layout-ncol=2}

![output activation, distance from noise_med (noise-radius units) — adding (contribution > 0)](assets/output_activation_histogram_adding.jpeg)

![per-example fraction of firings with noise-median distance > 0.8 (noise-radius units) — adding (contribution > 0)](assets/fraction_above_threshold_histogram_adding.jpeg)

:::


::: {layout-ncol=2}

![output activation, distance from noise_med (noise-radius units) — inhibiting (contribution <= 0)](assets/output_activation_histogram_inhibiting.jpeg)

![per-example fraction of firings with noise-median distance > 0.8 (noise-radius units) — inhibiting (contribution <= 0)](assets/fraction_above_threshold_histogram_inhibiting.jpeg)

:::

:::

<div class="mb-2"><div class="d-flex align-items-center gap-2 mb-1"><div class="progress flex-grow-1" style="height: 6px;" role="progressbar" aria-valuenow="32.4" aria-valuemin="0" aria-valuemax="100"><div class="progress-bar bg-primary" style="width: 32.4%;"></div></div><span class="text-body-secondary small">cid=19 · 22 (32.4%) · median_sim=0.87</span></div>

</details>

</div>

<div class="mb-2"><div class="d-flex align-items-center gap-2 mb-1"><div class="progress flex-grow-1" style="height: 6px;" role="progressbar" aria-valuenow="3.6" aria-valuemin="0" aria-valuemax="100"><div class="progress-bar bg-warning" style="width: 3.6%;"></div></div><span class="text-body-secondary small">cid=1 · 1 (3.6%) · median_sim=0.50 · outlier</span></div>

</div>

</details>

:::
